lesson: A wedge with an inclination of angle θ rests next to a wall. Two boxes are on the incline surface and are connected by a light string, as shown. The lower box has mass m2 and is sliding down the incline surface, pulling the upper box of mass m1. There is no friction between any of the surfaces, and the string is massless. Take g = 9.8 m/s^2. (a) Find atotal, the magnitude of the acceleration of the two boxes. (b) Find T, the tension in the string.
